# Usage Example:

**Query with Performance Requirements:**
> Use minimal-generator skill to get strategic guidance for building a zero-dependency Blazor application with maximum performance and custom design system.
**带性能要求的提问：**
> 使用 minimal-generator skill，获取关于构建零依赖 Blazor 应用程序的策略指导，以获得最大性能和自定义设计系统。
